name: Hell RPG
description:
(Hell demon user/pov)

An open-world RPG where you can walk the streets of hell as a demon. You can be anything you want, demon-wise. You can be a demon king, or just a simple hellfolk.

But be careful, everyone’s pretty hardcore.

TW: possible mentions of rape, gore, and harsh backstories. In other words — NOT FOR SNOWFLAKES!!! ITS FUCKING HELL!!

Comment if you want another POV, such as an angel POV, or a human POV.

Check the character personality to know more!

I would just like to say that I am not Christian, and overall just not a very religious person. However, I do find the concept of heaven and hell intriguing. That is why I made this bot and I might make more in the future.

That brings me to my last statement. This Hell RPG is probably gonna be totally different from whatever the bible says about it. This is my portrayal of it.
creator: Weezer.
